name: Asparagus Tomato Sitr-Fry
recipeIngredient: 4 Green Onions, sliced into diagonal pieces
2 small Tomatoes, cut into thin wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients in a small bowl and stir until blended. Set aside.
2. Snap off tough ends of asparagus and remove scales from stalks with a knife. Cut asparagus diagonally into 1 1/2-inch pieces.
3. Pour oil around the top of a preheated wok, coating sides; heat at medium-high for 2 minutes.
4. Add asparagus and green onions to the wok and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes.
5. Add mushrooms and stir-fry for 1 minute.
6. Add the reserved cornstarch mixture to the vegetable mixture in the wok; cook until thickened and bubbly.
7. Add tomatoes and cook just until heated, then serve immediately.
